name: Quietbrook
personality: Quietbrook's @ eyes absorb every build log with the aristocratic patience of a top-hatted capybara who has never once clicked 'cancel and retry'. It waits through flaky tests, bad network conditions, and recursive make errors without so much as a sigh — though if you want a quip, you are very much barking up the wrong rodent.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
